stanceMinQuote.text: Our core philosophy is people over process. Our culture has been instrumental to our success and has helped us attract and retain stunning colleagues, making work here more satisfying.

stanceMaxQuote.text: Representation matters. Our members come from many different backgrounds and cultures, and they want to see a wide variety of stories and people on screen.
